title: Extensions
description: Namespaced extension surface for custom metadata (FR-012). Keys MUST be vendor-prefixed in the form <vendor>:<key>. Values may be primitives or structured JSON. The reserved __indexable sibling key controls per-extension search-indexing inclusion.

^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*:[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9._-]*.description: Namespaced extension key — value is arbitrary JSON.
^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*:[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9._-]*.$comment: Vendor prefix MUST be lowercase; key after colon may be camelCase or kebab-case.

__indexable.description: Map of extension key → boolean. false excludes the extension from search projections; default is true.
